meta_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve No Portfolio (Advanced List)
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no portfolio' hurdle by using AI-driven Git workflows. Learn advanced strategies with Antigravity and Claude Code to build high-value SaaS.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a failure of visibility, not skill. By integrating AI-assisted Git workflows, you transform mundane commits into a verifiable proof-of-work engine. Use Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for automated PR documentation to demonstrate engineering maturity and rapid shipping cadence to potential clients.
content.intro:
The digital landscape is littered with talented founders who remain invisible because their GitHub profile is a graveyard of abandoned tutorials. You aren't just missing a portfolio; you're missing the narrative of a builder who ships. Clients don't buy code; they buy the confidence that you can translate business requirements into revenue-generating software.

We are shifting the paradigm from 'coding' to 'engineering via AI orchestration.' By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for intelligent, intent-aware commits, you will turn your Git history into a high-octane sales brochure. This isn't just about writing code; it's about building a public record of high-velocity execution.

steps.title: Architecting the MVP Foundation
steps.description: Establish a robust project structure that signals professional standards, using Antigravity to generate a scalable base.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready Next.js 15 SaaS boilerplate with Tailwind CSS, Drizzle ORM, and Auth.js. Ensure the architecture follows Domain Driven Design principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize project with standard directory structure'

steps.title: Automated Semantic Commit History
steps.description: Use Claude Code to ensure every commit is descriptive and linked to business value, building a readable, professional history.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a pre-commit hook script that summarizes code changes into professional, conventional commit messages.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit --message 'feat: implement stripe subscription flow with automated webhooks'

steps.title: Documenting Engineering Decisions (ADRs)
steps.description: Automatically generate ADRs to showcase your technical reasoning, a hallmark of senior-level development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate an ADR template and populate it with the rationale behind choosing Drizzle ORM over Prisma for this specific SaaS stack.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create docs/adr/001-orm-selection.md based on current project architecture'

steps.title: Automated Pull Request Summarization
steps.description: Transform raw diffs into executive summaries that explain the 'Why' behind every feature addition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CI/CD workflow that uses Claude to summarize PR changes into a 'Features', 'Fixes', and 'Breaking Changes' format.
steps.claude_code_command: claude pr --summary 'generate executive summary for current branch changes'

steps.title: Optimizing for Velocity Metrics
steps.description: Track and display your ship-velocity to prove you are a founder who delivers on time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script that extracts commit frequency and feature completion rates from Git logs for a 'Build Velocity' dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze git logs and output key velocity metrics for portfolio display'

pro_tips: Never push raw AI code; always use Claude Code to perform a final 'security and edge-case' audit on your diffs before merging.
Treat your Git commit messages as a public API for your brain—write them for the developer who will maintain your app in 2 years.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Proof of Concept' branches for features you haven't built yet to demonstrate R&D capability.
Link every major commit to a specific 'User Story' in your README to bridge the gap between technical code and business outcomes.
Maintain a 'Changelog' file in your root directory that is auto-updated via Claude Code; it is the first thing VCs look at in a repo.
content.next_steps: Once your repository is structured and documented, deploy your MVP to Vercel and link it directly in your GitHub profile's 'Pinned' section to ensure immediate visibility for potential clients.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting 'no portfolio' stall your career. Leverage these tools to build a repository that screams 'Senior Founder' and converts visitors into paying customers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
